_comment: RESTRICTED MCP Claude Desktop config — tightly scoped MCP servers, extensions disabled. Legacy alias for config-moderate.json. Prefer the moderate tier for new deployments.

filesystem-workspace._comment: Read/write access limited to one project directory only. The filesystem server restricts operations to the specified paths.

git-repo._comment: Git operations on a single repo. Note: mcp-server-git is a Python package (install via pip/uvx, not npx). The server exposes both read and write git tools — scope to a single repo to limit blast radius.

_enterprise_policies._comment: Deploy these via MDM — listed here as a reference, not part of the runtime config.
